---
title: "SEC News Digest — Enforcement Actions"
about:
  template: trestles # Professional sidebar layout
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/CasparDP
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

## Welcome
You can find our work on analyzing SEC enforcement actions. Check out our [dashboard](notebooks/sec_digest_dashboard.qmd) for interactive insights!

This is site will be looking better soon!
